description_long: This is a double grave plot set on a tiled rectangular base, featuring two parallel grave beds bordered by black stone frames filled with green grass or turf. At the head of the graves stands a large, polished black headstone with engraved portraits, names, and a central cross motif, indicating a shared memorial for two individuals. The headstone is rectangular with a slightly raised base, and the engravings are white, providing a stark contrast against the dark stone. The grave beds are symmetrically aligned, separated by a tiled walkway, and the entire structure is surrounded by a grid of light gray tiles. The rear of the headstone is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the focus on the front-facing memorial. The overall design is modern and orderly, with clean lines and a somber, respectful aesthetic.
description: A double grave plot with two grass-filled beds, bordered by black stone and a large engraved headstone featuring portraits and a cross, all set on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two parallel grave beds, the tiled base, and the engraved headstone with visible portraits and cross.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved headstone with portraits, names, and cross, as well as the symmetrical arrangement of the two grave beds.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the grave beds and the headstone from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headstone and the tiled base, with the grave beds partially visible.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Portraits and names of two individuals
